title: Exceptions, Cleanup, and Context Managers · Runtime Lens: Python Raise Chaining
summary: Make the resource inventory survive invalid records, unavailable files, and partial operations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python raise chaining increment in a failure-resilient inventory importer. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Raise meaningful exceptions and preserve or suppress causes deliberately with exception chaining syntax.
Use try, except, else, and finally so protected work, success work, and cleanup have distinct roles.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
